Package neqsim.pvtsimulation.flowassurance

Class FlowlineScaleProfile

java.lang.Object
neqsim.pvtsimulation.flowassurance.FlowlineScaleProfile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class FlowlineScaleProfile extends Object implements Serializable
Computes mineral scale saturation indices along a flowline given a T/P profile and water chemistry.

In subsea and onshore pipelines, temperature and pressure change along the flowline due to heat loss and friction. This class discretises the pipeline into segments and evaluates scale risk at each location using ScalePredictionCalculator.

Usage: 

 
 FlowlineScaleProfile profile = new FlowlineScaleProfile();
 profile.setWaterChemistry(400, 10, 5, 0, 150, 10, 35000, 2.0, 6.5);
 profile.setInletConditions(80.0, 200.0);
 profile.setOutletConditions(20.0, 100.0);
 profile.setNumberOfSegments(20);
 profile.calculate();
 System.out.println(profile.toJson());
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    • FlowlineScaleProfile

      public FlowlineScaleProfile()

  • Method Details

    • setWaterChemistry

      public void setWaterChemistry(double caMgL, double baMgL, double srMgL, double feMgL, double hco3MgL, double so4MgL, double tdsMgL, double co2pp, double pH)
      Sets the water chemistry for the flowline.
      Parameters:
      caMgL - calcium mg/L
      baMgL - barium mg/L
      srMgL - strontium mg/L
      feMgL - iron mg/L
      hco3MgL - bicarbonate mg/L
      so4MgL - sulphate mg/L
      tdsMgL - TDS mg/L
      co2pp - CO2 partial pressure bar
      pH - pH value

    • setMgNaConcentrations

      public void setMgNaConcentrations(double mgMgL, double naMgL)
      Sets magnesium and sodium concentrations.
      Parameters:
      mgMgL - magnesium mg/L
      naMgL - sodium mg/L

    • setInletConditions

      public void setInletConditions(double tempC, double pressBar)
      Sets the inlet (wellhead) conditions.
      Parameters:
      tempC - temperature Celsius
      pressBar - pressure bara

    • setOutletConditions

      public void setOutletConditions(double tempC, double pressBar)
      Sets the outlet (host) conditions.
      Parameters:
      tempC - temperature Celsius
      pressBar - pressure bara

    • setNumberOfSegments

      public void setNumberOfSegments(int n)
      Sets the number of segments to discretise the flowline into.
      Parameters:
      n - number of segments (must be at least 2)

    • setAutoPH

      public void setAutoPH(boolean auto)
      Enables or disables automatic pH estimation.
      Parameters:
      auto - true to enable auto pH

    • calculate

      public void calculate()
      Runs the scale profile calculation.

    • getResults

      public List<FlowlineScaleProfile.SegmentResult> getResults()
      Returns the calculation results.
      Returns:
      list of segment results

    • getMaxSI

      public double getMaxSI(String scaleName)
      Returns the maximum SI for a given scale across all segments.
      Parameters:
      scaleName - one of CaCO3, BaSO4, SrSO4, CaSO4, FeCO3
      Returns:
      maximum SI value

    • getSegmentResult

      public FlowlineScaleProfile.SegmentResult getSegmentResult(int index)
      Returns the segment result at a given index.
      Parameters:
      index - segment index (0-based)
      Returns:
      segment result

    • getSIByName

      private double getSIByName(FlowlineScaleProfile.SegmentResult sr, String name)
      Returns the SI for a named scale at a segment result.
      Parameters:
      sr - the segment result
      name - scale name
      Returns:
      SI value

      Returns a comprehensive JSON report.

      JSON string

      Parameters:
      si - saturation index
      Returns:
